claims.name: Blind arbitrary FP/BF16-to-ternary PTQ retrofit
claims.public_label: Do not claim a universal converter.
claims.evidence: FP mean=0.644169 over 10 tasks; PTQ mean=0.348671 over 10 tasks; delta=-0.295498; WikiText PPL ratio=2.743e+05.

claims.name: QAT/distillation recovery over blind PTQ
claims.public_label: Claim partial recovery only, not FP-quality recovery.
claims.evidence: row-scale mean=0.499459 over 10 tasks; recovery over PTQ=0.150788; delta vs FP=-0.144710; row WikiText PPL=38.580065.

claims.name: Paper-level BitDistill reproduction
claims.public_label: Keep labeled as paper-inspired until full controlled rows close the FP gap.
claims.evidence: controlled rows complete=1/3; passed FP recovery=0; best controlled accuracy=0.691187; best paired delta vs FP=-0.116964.

claims.name: Row-scale I2_SR runtime semantics
claims.public_label: Claim runtime/scale-contract viability, not a Q4 quality/storage win.

claims.name: TL2 row-scale runtime readiness
claims.public_label: Use I2_SR until TL2 has explicit row/group-scale metadata and kernels.
claims.evidence: runtime_ready=false; current row-scale error=1.904230; exact row-scale design error=0.000197; finite TL2 quality=false.

claims.name: Native packed sequence-classification deployment
claims.public_label: Implement native classifier head metadata/runtime before product claims.
claims.evidence: same artifact ready=false; sidecar examples=128; sidecar accuracy=0.609375; agreement=0.914062.

claims.name: Kimi/MoE product support
claims.public_label: Keep MoE/Kimi in future work until trained quality, routing locality, and runtime are measured.
claims.evidence: Kimi config supported=false; local Kimi artifacts=0; failed MoE gates=3/9.

safe_public_summary: Blind PTQ-to-ternary is rejected for the tested dense-Qwen setup.
QAT/distillation is a partial recovery path, not an FP-quality result yet.
Row-scale I2_SR is a runtime-semantics contribution for compatible dense causal artifacts.
Paper-level BitDistill, native packed classifier deployment, TL2 row-scale, and Kimi/MoE remain gated.
